name: What proof do I need for my slipped disc claim at work in Sandy Utah?

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for my slipped disc claim at work in Sandy Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical reports, incident form, witnesses showing job link[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical records, incident report, witness statements, and wage docs proving work causation.** Utah requires objective evidence injury arose from employment[1]. **Key factors:** Timestamped notice; doctor notes linking to job; photos of hazard if possible. **Practical guidance:** Report in writing immediately, photograph scene, attend authorized exams, save all bills. No need to prove fault against employer. **Strong evidence speeds approval.**

description: Medical reports, incident form, witnesses showing job link[1].
